description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Turbinia E2E Test that runs on push and pull request events. Use a job matrix to test on ubuntu-24.04 with gift_ppa_track set to staging and stable. In each job, check out the code, set up Docker Buildx, build Turbinia API server, server, and worker Docker images, prepare Turbinia configuration, display the configuration, patch docker-compose config, update pip, install turbinia-client, and run E2E tests.
